ships.name: Amidala
ships.description: The Amidala-class Battleship (dubbed the Amidala amongst Illumina Regions residents) is the Sayari Plushie Authority's special variant of the Kor Sestor's Kar Ik Vot 349. It has additional outfit space, and has 3 engines instead of 2. A modified version of the Kor Sestor AI is installed on this ship, meaning it requires very little crew. 	The source code of the modified AI is free and open-source. An installation of the AI comes bundled with every purchase of an Amidala-class Battleship.

ships.name: SPA Rosas
ships.description: The Rosas-class freighter ("Rosas" meaning "pink" in Tagalog) is a large-scale plushie smuggling ship, meant as a replacement for the Syndicate Bulk Freighter. It may be a freighter but it is classified as a Medium Warship due to its armanent.

variants.name: Amidala Miner
variants.description: The Amidala-class Battleship (dubbed the Amidala amongst Illumina Regions residents) is the Sayari Plushie Authority's special variant of the Kor Sestor's Kar Ik Vot 349. It has additional outfit space, and has 3 engines instead of 2. A modified version of the Kor Sestor AI is installed on this ship, meaning it requires very little crew. 	The source code of the modified AI is free and open-source. An installation of the AI comes bundled with every purchase of an Amidala-class Battleship.

variants.name: Amidala (Skylance Amidala)
variants.description: The Amidala-class Battleship (dubbed the Amidala amongst Illumina Regions residents) is the Sayari Plushie Authority's special variant of the Kor Sestor's Kar Ik Vot 349. It has additional outfit space, and has 3 engines instead of 2. A modified version of the Kor Sestor AI is installed on this ship, meaning it requires very little crew. 	The source code of the modified AI is free and open-source. An installation of the AI comes bundled with every purchase of an Amidala-class Battleship.

variants.name: Falcon (CSSF Falcon (Electron))
variants.description: The Tarazed Falcon is one of the most powerful warships that civilians can buy, a sleeker and more maneuverable alternative to the venerable and somewhat outdated Leviathan.

variants.name: Heliarch Punisher (SPA Heliarch Punisher)
variants.description: Although not quite as strong or powerful as the Quarg ships that they are designed to oppose, Heliarch Punishers are versatile and durable ships. Rumors say that the Heliarchs have a small stash of stolen Quarg Skylances that they can outfit the Punishers with in times of war.

variants.name: Heliarch Breacher (SPA Heliarch Breacher)
variants.description: The Breacher isn't the most durable Heliarch vessel, but its impressive forward speed and high firepower for its size make this ship ideal for strafing runs.

variants.name: Heliarch Hunter (SPA Heliarch Hunter)
variants.description: Although they mostly serve as patrol vessels nowadays in peacetime, Hunters were originally designed to quickly track down dissidents and bring them to justice.

variants.name: Heliarch Interdictor (SPA Heliarch Interdictor)
variants.description: Anyone who incurs the wrath of the Heliarchs cannot count on making a fast getaway thanks to the Interdictors, which were primarily designed to carry a pair of attractor and repulsor beams that can hold a ship a safe distance away while pushing it around enough to prevent it from getting a hyperspace lock to jump out of the system.

variants.name: Heliarch Judicator (SPA Heliarch Judicator)
variants.description: During their time battling the Quarg, the Coalition focused on producing the strongest, toughest warships they could, so fightercraft were out of the question. Now, however, the Heliarch's shield matrix and hull integrity technology is much more advanced, and they have recently experimented with such ships. The Judicator was made for transportation of these new fighters. 	Alongside their six fighter bays, Judicators come with a large bunk count and higher cargo space than other Heliarch warships, thus doubling as a logistics vessel for transporting troops and equipment.

variants.name: Heliarch Neutralizer (SPA Heliarch Neutralizer)
variants.description: The most common Heliarch patrol ship, Neutralizers are designed to be just strong enough to keep an enemy vessel occupied until reinforcements can arrive.

variants.name: Hauler III (SPA Hauler III)
variants.description: Considered by many to be outdated, there are nonetheless many Haulers still in service due to their combination of comparatively low price and simple construction. This large version of the Hauler provides the best tradeoff between price and cargo space.

variants.name: Aerie Miner
variants.description: The Lionheart Aerie is a light carrier, designed to be just big enough for four fighter bays plus a decent armament of its own. Variations on this same ship design have been in use in the Deep for almost half a millennium, but this model comes with the very latest in generator and weapon technology.

variants.name: Gunboat (SPA Gunboat)
variants.description: The Navy Gunboat is designed for engaging targets at short range, and also serves as the Navy's mobile sensor platform, scanning ships for illegal equipment or cargo.

variants.name: Gunboat (SPA Gunboat (Proton Gun))
variants.description: The Navy Gunboat is designed for engaging targets at short range, and also serves as the Navy's mobile sensor platform, scanning ships for illegal equipment or cargo.

variants.name: Gunboat (SPA Gunboat (Blaze-Pike))
variants.description: The Navy Gunboat is designed for engaging targets at short range, and also serves as the Navy's mobile sensor platform, scanning ships for illegal equipment or cargo.

variants.name: Cruiser (SPA Cruiser)
variants.description: The Republic Cruiser is a relatively recent design, a much larger version of the Frigate designed to be able to take on an entire pirate fleet if necessary. In addition to a wide variety of weaponry, Cruisers have space to carry four attack drones: fast, pilotless fighters that can be controlled remotely.

variants.name: Cruiser (SPA Cruiser (PFC))
variants.description: The Republic Cruiser is a relatively recent design, a much larger version of the Frigate designed to be able to take on an entire pirate fleet if necessary. In addition to a wide variety of weaponry, Cruisers have space to carry four attack drones: fast, pilotless fighters that can be controlled remotely.

variants.name: Cruiser (SPA Cruiser (Blaze-Pike))
variants.description: The Republic Cruiser is a relatively recent design, a much larger version of the Frigate designed to be able to take on an entire pirate fleet if necessary. In addition to a wide variety of weaponry, Cruisers have space to carry four attack drones: fast, pilotless fighters that can be controlled remotely.

variants.name: Cruiser (SPA Cruiser (Electron))
variants.description: The Republic Cruiser is a relatively recent design, a much larger version of the Frigate designed to be able to take on an entire pirate fleet if necessary. In addition to a wide variety of weaponry, Cruisers have space to carry four attack drones: fast, pilotless fighters that can be controlled remotely.

variants.description: The Republic Cruiser is a relatively recent design, a much larger version of the Frigate designed to be able to take on an entire pirate fleet if necessary. In addition to a wide variety of weaponry, Cruisers have space to carry four attack drones: fast, pilotless fighters that can be controlled remotely.

variants.name: Cruiser (SPA Cruiser (Korath Slicer))
variants.description: The Republic Cruiser is a relatively recent design, a much larger version of the Frigate designed to be able to take on an entire pirate fleet if necessary. In addition to a wide variety of weaponry, Cruisers have space to carry four attack drones: fast, pilotless fighters that can be controlled remotely.

variants.name: Cruiser (SPA Cruiser (Particle Cannon))
variants.description: The Republic Cruiser is a relatively recent design, a much larger version of the Frigate designed to be able to take on an entire pirate fleet if necessary. In addition to a wide variety of weaponry, Cruisers have space to carry four attack drones: fast, pilotless fighters that can be controlled remotely.

variants.name: Carrier (SPA Carrier (Combat))
variants.description: The Carrier is more than just a warship: it is practically a mobile space station, with docking bays for an entire squadron of drones and fighters and enough crew to fill a small village. Although designed primarily for engaging enemies from a distance, a Carrier can also do significant damage in close combat.

variants.name: Shield Beetle (SPA Shield Beetle (Proton))
variants.description: This ship was first built millennia ago, near the end of a more violent time in Hai history. Since then, it has served as the only heavy warship at the disposal of the Hai. The Shield Beetle is a versatile warship used by the Hai to guard their merchant convoys, or by the Unfettered to attack those very same convoys.

variants.name: Skein (SPA Skein)
variants.description: This particular cockpit and engine set has found itself attached to three of Southbound Shipyards' new "Type F" Fighter-carrier pods. When the Free Worlds asked for a carrier, they did not expect one that would be able to carry almost as many fighters as the heaviest Navy warships. Given this fact, the Free Worlds have asked Southbound and Tarazed to restrict sale of the "Hauler III: Type F," "Skein" to its Militia only.

variants.name: Bactrian (Old Bactrian)
variants.description: The Lionheart Bactrian is the last of the great city-ships, a design hearkening back to the early days of space colonization when a long-distance vessel needed to be a self-contained world, able to survive for weeks at a time without encountering an inhabited planet. It is not only a freighter, but a carrier, and a capable warship either at short range or at a distance. 	Naturally, this versatility also makes it extremely expensive, and the Bactrian is normally only for sale to citizens who have been vetted by the local government of the Deep.

variants.name: Kestrel (SPA Kestrel)
variants.description: Several years ago, while visiting a sweat lodge in search of spiritual renewal, Tarazed's chief ship designer fell into a trance and journeyed to a reality separate from our own. There he saw visions of a strange and elegant starship. Returning to his work with renewed purpose, he spent the next seven years making the Kestrel a reality.

variants.name: Kestrel (SPA Kestrel (Proton))
variants.description: Several years ago, while visiting a sweat lodge in search of spiritual renewal, Tarazed's chief ship designer fell into a trance and journeyed to a reality separate from our own. There he saw visions of a strange and elegant starship. Returning to his work with renewed purpose, he spent the next seven years making the Kestrel a reality.

variants.name: Falcon (SPA Falcon (Korath Slicer))
variants.description: The Tarazed Falcon is one of the most powerful warships that civilians can buy, a sleeker and more maneuverable alternative to the venerable and somewhat outdated Leviathan.

outfits.name: SPA Skylance
outfits.description: These immensely powerful beam weapons are used by Quarg warships to strike fear into the hearts of all who dare oppose them. After the disappearance of several SPA agents equipped with Skylances after landing on a Quarg ringworld, the SPA created a slightly different version of the Skylance, which would hopefully be undetectable.

outfits.name: SPA Scan Blocker
outfits.description: The Sayari Plushie Authority uses this Scan Blocker to block incoming CSSF scans and allow their plushie transports to pass by undetected. Combined with false flag Merchant-colored transports, plushies can be transported to any world in human space with minimal fuss.

outfits.name: Ship Sniper
outfits.description: The Ship Sniper is a prototype weapon capable of dealing immense damage to any ship unlucky enough to be hit by a Ship Sniper. It has a long reload time and uses up energy and emits immense heat every time it is fired.
